summary: Embrace the journey, strength isn't built overnight but forged with consistency and the right fuel. Let's power up your lifts and nourish your body for peak performance!

weeks.focus: Foundation & Technique Refinement: Establish solid form and accumulate quality reps.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.note: Focus on controlled descent and hitting depth

exercises.name: Paused Bench Press
exercises.note: 1-2 second pause at the bottom

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: Control the negative, full range of motion

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.note: Maintain a straight line from head to heels

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.note: Maintain a strong arch and leg drive

exercises.name: Overhead Press (Standing)
exercises.note: Engage core, avoid leaning back excessively

exercises.name: Bent-Over Barbell Rows
exercises.note: Keep back straight, pull to lower chest/upper abs

exercises.name: Triceps Pushdowns
exercises.note: Full elbow extension, squeeze triceps

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.note: Focus on perfect form, brace core strongly

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.note: Maintain upright torso, chest up

exercises.name: Lat Pulldowns (or Pull-ups)
exercises.note: Feel the stretch at the top, squeeze lats at bottom

exercises.name: Hamstring Curls (Machine)
exercises.note: Control the movement, feel hamstring contraction

weeks.focus: Volume & Intensity Increase: Build work capacity with slightly heavier weights.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.note: Maintain form as weight increases

exercises.name: Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.note: Elbows tucked, focus on triceps engagement

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
exercises.note: Feel stretch in hamstrings, don't round back

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.note: Deep squat, focus on mobility and control

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.note: Focus on driving the bar efficiently

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.note: Slight incline, squeeze chest at top

exercises.name: Seated Cable Rows
exercises.note: Pull with back, not just arms, squeeze shoulder blades

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Target rear delts and upper back for shoulder health

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.note: Maintain tightness throughout the lift

exercises.name: Paused Squat
exercises.note: 2-3 second pause at the bottom to build strength out of hole

exercises.name: Barbell Rows
exercises.note: Control the weight, avoid jerking

exercises.name: Bicep Curls (Barbell/Dumbbell)
exercises.note: Controlled movement, focus on peak contraction

weeks.focus: Peak Strength Block: Higher intensity, lower reps, pushing near your limits.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.note: Focus on powerful concentric movement

exercises.name: Bench Press (Competition Grip)
exercises.note: Practice competition setup and cues

exercises.name: Hack Squat (Machine)
exercises.note: Deep stretch, control at the bottom

exercises.name: Ab Rollouts (or similar)
exercises.note: Maintain strong core brace throughout

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.note: Explode off the chest, consistent leg drive

exercises.name: Overhead Press (Standing)
exercises.note: Drive through the heels, lock out strong

exercises.name: T-Bar Rows
exercises.note: Use a neutral grip for back thickness

exercises.name: Dumbbell Flyes
exercises.note: Controlled stretch, feel chest working

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.note: Max effort for each rep, reset if needed

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift
exercises.note: Explore different stance/grip, focus on glute drive

exercises.name: Pull-ups (Weighted if possible)
exercises.note: Go to failure, use assist if necessary for volume

exercises.name: Glute Ham Raise (or Hyperextension)
exercises.note: Strong hamstring and glute contraction

weeks.focus: Active Recovery / Deload: Reduce fatigue, consolidate strength gains, and prepare for next cycle.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.note: Light weight, focus on perfect technique and speed

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.note: Light weight, smooth movement

exercises.name: Leg Extension (Machine)
exercises.note: Focus on quad contraction, controlled movement

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.note: Light weight, rehearse setup and execution

exercises.name: Overhead Press (Standing)
exercises.note: Light weight, focus on lockout

exercises.name: Lat Pulldowns
exercises.note: Light weight, emphasize muscle contraction

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.note: Very light weight, perfect form, practice bracing

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
exercises.note: Focus on hamstring stretch, light weight

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Maintain shoulder health with high reps

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.food: Paneer bhurji (100g paneer) with 3 rotis, mixed vegetable sabzi (cooked in a bit more oil)

meals.name: Mid-morning Snack
meals.food: 1 cup Sprouted Moong Chaat with a handful of peanuts and pumpkin seeds

meals.name: Lunch
meals.food: 1.5 cups Rajma/Chana Dal, 2.5 cups Brown Rice, large portion of vegetable sabzi

meals.name: Pre-workout Snack
meals.food: 2 Bananas, 2 tbsp Peanut Butter, 1 scoop Vegan Protein Shake (e.g., soy or pea protein)

meals.name: Dinner
meals.food: Soya chunks (75g dry weight, ~250g cooked) curry with 3 multigrain rotis, large green salad with 1/2 avocado

tips: Prioritize protein: As a vegetarian, ensure consistent intake of high-quality protein from sources like paneer, tofu, soya chunks, lentils, and plant-based protein powders.
Master your form: Always focus on perfect technique, especially for the main lifts. Watch videos, record yourself, and don't be afraid to deload to refine your movement patterns.
Listen to your body: Recovery is crucial for strength. Ensure adequate sleep, hydration, and don't push through sharp pain. Take an extra rest day if needed to avoid overtraining.
